name: Hotel Lavaux
description: 4-star design hotel in a 1964 listed building by architect Alberto Sartoris, fully renovated in 2012. Set in the heart of the Lavaux UNESCO World Heritage vineyard terraces overlooking Lake Geneva. Rooftop terrace with panoramic views of the lake and Alps. 2-minute walk from Epesses train station.
meta: ~20 min by train to Montreux · Epesses station
